response.justification: Strong fullstack candidate with 15+ years of experience spanning frontend, backend, mobile, and embedded systems. Recent roles at Stripe and Shopify involve TypeScript, Node.js, React, and AI-agent infrastructure (MCP), directly aligning with the primary stack and AI agent requirement. Demonstrates software craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD), polyglot proficiency, and teaching/community contributions. Main gaps are explicit Nest.js and Kotlin experience, but the breadth and depth of relevant skills make this a strong interview candidate.
strengths: Deep fullstack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, and AWS at Stripe and Shopify
Direct AI-agent infrastructure experience including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, testing frameworks, open-source contributions, and technical talks
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in the resume
Kotlin not listed; Java experience is older (robotic arms work pre-2018)
Some role/company associations look unusual (e.g., 'Founder, Datadog' likely a resume formatting issue) and warrant clarification

key_factors.factor: AI agent / MCP experience at Stripe
